overall.description: A first-person perspective walk along a narrow dirt path at night, illuminated by a flashlight or headlamp. The path runs alongside a tall historic stone wall in a rural setting, with the camera moving steadily forward through what appears to be a game engine environment with atmospheric lighting.

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person walk along a narrow dirt path at night. A tall stone wall runs along the right side while grass lines the left. The path is illuminated by a flashlight, revealing the uneven ground ahead as the camera moves forward through the quiet rural setting.

segments.scene_description: As the walk continues, trees emerge on the right side growing alongside the stone wall. The flashlight illuminates the tree trunks as the camera passes them, while the path remains narrow and enclosed by vegetation on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching rural structure with fenced wall

segments.scene_description: The stone wall on the right now features wooden fence posts on top. The trees from the previous section have passed out of view, and the path leads toward a dark building visible in the distance. The flashlight continues to illuminate the dirt path as the camera approaches the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a narrow dirt path at night that transitions from an open rural corridor into a more enclosed approach toward a distant structure. It begins with a steady forward movement beside a tall stone wall and grassy verge, with a flashlight cutting through the darkness to reveal the uneven ground. As the camera progresses, the environment becomes more crowded as trees emerge to line the right side, their trunks momentarily illuminated by the beam. The scene then shifts as the trees recede and the stone wall evolves to feature wooden fence posts along its top. Finally, the path opens up slightly, leading the camera directly toward a dark building looming in the distance under the constant glow of the flashlight.
